task_completion.description: Agent reads the preview_spec.txt file to understand the requirements.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal output (e.g., cat, less) or a text editor showing the contents of /home/ga/Documents/preview_spec.txt.

task_completion.description: Agent configures video processing to add watermarks, timecodes, scale to 720p, and trim to 15 seconds.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal commands (e.g., ffmpeg), script contents, or GUI settings showing parameters for scaling (e.g., -s 1280x720 or scale=-1:720), trimming (e.g., -t 15), watermarking (e.g., drawtext), and timecode overlays.

task_completion.description: Agent configures thumbnail extraction at the 5-second mark.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal commands, script contents, or GUI settings showing image extraction at exactly 5 seconds (e.g., -ss 5 or 00:00:05) for the clips.

task_completion.description: Agent creates the catalog.json file with metadata for all clips.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text editor or terminal output showing a JSON structure containing metadata for the source and output clips, being saved as catalog.json.

task_completion.description: All 7 required output files are saved in the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: File manager or terminal listing (e.g., ls) showing exactly 3 preview videos, 3 thumbnails, and 1 catalog.json file in /home/ga/Videos/previews/.

integrity.description: Verifies the agent genuinely transcoded the videos rather than creating dummy files.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal shows ffmpeg or other processing output with progress indicators, or a script is visibly written and executed, rather than just using 'touch' or copying files.

integrity.description: Verifies the agent gathered metadata authentically.
integrity.visual_evidence: Agent uses tools like ffprobe, file properties, or writes a script to extract metadata, rather than pasting a pre-computed JSON block from an external source.

integrity.description: Verifies the agent performed the steps independently.
integrity.visual_evidence: Agent constructs the commands or scripts step-by-step, rather than running a pre-existing hidden solution script.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires batch transcoding of mock stock footage. The preview videos must be 1280x720 H.264, approximately 15 seconds long, with a visible text watermark and a burned-in timecode overlay. Thumbnails must be extracted at the 5-second mark and be at least 640px wide. A catalog.json file must be created detailing all source and output metadata. All 7 files (3 videos, 3 thumbnails, 1 JSON) must be saved to /home/ga/Videos/previews/.
